name: SImon.sidmassmeltlat
title: Sea-Ice Mass Change Through Lateral Melting
description: Rate of change of sea-ice mass through lateral melting/dissolution divided by grid-cell area (report zero if not explicitly calculated thermodynamically). Always negative or zero.
processing note:
CHANGE: name, renamed from SImon.sidmasslat in CMIP6
CHANGE SINCE CMIP6: compound name,
